title: Neolindleya decipiens
taxonomy: Neolindleya decipiens is classified as a species of orchid, which is part of the family Orchidaceae. This classification is based on its physical characteristics and genetic traits that align with the orchid family. Within the Orchidaceae family, Neolindleya decipiens is typically placed in the subfamily Orchidoideae. The subfamily Orchidoideae is further divided into several tribes, with Neolindleya decipiens usually found in the tribe Cranichideae. This classification helps to organize and understand the relationships between different orchid species.
